name: Asparagus with Blue Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Snap the ends off asparagus spears.
2. Fill a medium skillet with 1-inch water and bring to a boil.
3. Add asparagus in a single layer and cook for 8 to 10 minutes or until tender.
4. Drain well and arrange on a serving plate.
5. In a small bowl, stir together vinegar and olive oil.
6. Add crumbled blue cheese and minced chives; mix well.
7. Pour the mixture over the hot asparagus.
8. Season to taste with plenty of white pepper.
9. Set aside until tepid, then serve.
